posts.author: paresh.sarjani1
posts.text: Concall snippets Guidance for FY27 - Revenue flat and Margin Mid 20s… (including all the impacts of Librela and costs for new facilities i.e. Bengaluru and Bay view Focus is shifting on CDMO more aggressively and management tone was more confident this time on the same. Traditional revenue split is 1/3 and 2/3 for CDMO/CRO which for Q4FY26 was 40/60. Kiran Mazumder Shaw calls FY27 to be reset year in terms of transformation/restructuring towards growth trajectory. Expect this to be foundation of future years and shifting gears in terms of growth from FY28 onwards Librela impact to be mostly do…

posts.author: paresh.sarjani1
posts.text: This is exactly what was wanted and happened. Exit of Peter Bains is being celebrated more than Syngene beating its own degrowth guidance. Waiting for Concall today to have some more interesting insights and full year FY27 guidance

posts.author: ashprit
posts.text: Looks like a complete management overhaul today… Kiran ma’am comes in as executive chairperson, Mr. Mittal of Biocon comes in a MD & CEO… new CHRO and CCO also joins in from Biocon. Can things turn around from here? Hoping for the best.

posts.author: GRP
posts.text: Are you still following Syngene. Poor results.
